input_contract: SISU is set by changing the scalar trial input to 0.0 or 1.0 before the standard perturbation bank is applied. All other validation-bank inputs and checkpoint selections are held fixed.

materialization_policy.reason: Existing targetfix perturbation summaries were materialized only at the default validation SISU input of 1.0; SISU=0 perturbation responses were not present in the compact summaries. The final comparison reruns both SISU=0 and SISU=1 locally through the same evaluator for paired apples-to-apples summaries.

metric_policy.difference_meaning: Differences are SISU1 minus SISU0. For signed endpoint and terminal-speed deltas, sign is diagnostic; closer to zero is usually preferable.
metric_policy.ratio_meaning: SISU1/SISU0 ratio < 1 means the SISU=1 conditioned controller had a smaller perturbation response on that metric; > 1 means larger.
